nasb.text: And he said to them, ‘An enemy has done this!’ The slaves *said to him, ‘Do you want us, then, to go and gather them up?’

esv.text: He said to them, ‘An enemy has done this.’ So the servants said to him, ‘Then do you want us to go and gather them?’

cnv.text: 他回答：‘這是仇敵所作的。’僕人問他：‘你要我們去拔掉它嗎？’

ccb.text: “主人回答说，‘这是仇敌做的。’奴仆问道，‘要我们去拔掉它们吗？’

csbs.text: “主人告诉他们：‘这是仇敌做的。’ “奴仆问：‘那么，你要我们去把稗子拔掉吗？’
